scope: CRM cross-hub timeline + dashboard reinforcement for Booking, Commerce, Tasks, and Sales

commands.notes: No new shells introduced; shell gate passed.
Pre-existing repository-wide TypeScript baseline errors remain outside this WO scope.

user_visible_changes: Contact Detail now has a Unified Timeline tab combining CRM interactions, booking appointments, ecommerce purchases, tasks, and service records in one chronological stream.
Timeline supports source filtering and CSV export for operational handoff/reporting.
CRM Dashboard now shows a Recent Commerce Orders section and a direct Sales Pipeline quick action, strengthening CRM as the core across commerce/booking/sales hubs.
